body_txt: Alice, Bob, and Charlie are chatting together, and Charlie viciously launches an insult at Bob; but Bob, Master of Missing the Point , fires back, "I won't let you insult Alice like that!" Occasionally this will take an alternate form where Bob hasn't missed the point at all but is deliberately misinterpreting the insult as a form of snark . Not to be confused with Insult Backfire . Compare Insult Friendly Fire , Wrong Insult Offence , Insult to Rocks .
